title: Me faire ça à moi
writer: Pierre Grimblat, Jean-Michel Sorel, François Truffaut
actors: Eddie Constantine, Bernadette Lafont, Jean-Louis Richard
plot: A down-on-his-luck reporter is framed on espionage charges by the government after taking some photos the government didn't want made public. He finds that in order to clear himself he has to transport some highly classified micro...
